title: endiandra forbesii
intro: Endiandra forbesii, also known as the Forbes' laurel or mountain laurel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Borneo and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, thanks to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Endiandra forbesii typically involve drying and processing the leaves to create teas, infusions, or extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
